source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A beaker is filled with some 1.0 M $CuSO_4$, and two carbon electrodes are placed in the beaker with a battery wired between them, as shown below. As current is run through the system, solid copper plates out onto the carbon cathode. Which of the following changes would increase the amount of solid copper that is plated out of solution?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Using a 9.0 V battery instead of a 1.5 V battery

choice_map.A: Replacing the 1.0 M $CuSO_4$ solution with 1.0 M $CuCl_2$
choice_map.B: Using a 9.0 V battery instead of a 1.5 V battery
choice_map.C: Decreasing the pH of the solution
choice_map.D: Changing out the carbon electrodes with platinum electrodes
